keyEvents.text: Goal! Trinidad and Tobago 1, St. Kitts And Nevis 0. Levi García (Trinidad and Tobago) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal following a corner.
Penalty saved. Levi García (Trinidad and Tobago) left footed shot saved in the centre of the goal by Julani Archibald (St. Kitts And Nevis).

Goal! Trinidad and Tobago 1, St. Kitts And Nevis 1. G'Vaune Amory (St. Kitts And Nevis) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Tyreece Simpson following a fast break.
Goal! Trinidad and Tobago 2, St. Kitts And Nevis 1. Dante Sealy (Trinidad and Tobago) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Levi García.
Goal! Trinidad and Tobago 2, St. Kitts And Nevis 2. Tiquanny Williams (St. Kitts And Nevis) from a free kick with a left footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Substitution, Trinidad and Tobago. André Raymond replaces Darnell Hospedales.
Substitution, Trinidad and Tobago. Ajani Fortune replaces Andre Rampersad.
Goal! Trinidad and Tobago 3, St. Kitts And Nevis 2. Kevin Molino (Trinidad and Tobago) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the top left corner.
Substitution, St. Kitts And Nevis. Harrison Panayiotou replaces G'Vaune Amory.
Substitution, St. Kitts And Nevis. Kimaree Rogers replaces Tyreece Simpson.
Goal! Trinidad and Tobago 4, St. Kitts And Nevis 2. Dante Sealy (Trinidad and Tobago) left footed shot from outside the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Levi García.
Substitution, St. Kitts And Nevis. Tyquan Terrell replaces Mervin Lewis because of an injury.
Substitution, St. Kitts And Nevis. Dionis Stephens replaces Kimaree Rogers because of an injury.
Substitution, St. Kitts And Nevis. Nequan Browne replaces Yohannes Mitchum.
Substitution, Trinidad and Tobago. Nathaniel James replaces Levi García.
Omari Sterling-James (St. Kitts And Nevis) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

Goal! Trinidad and Tobago 5, St. Kitts And Nevis 2. Ajani Fortune (Trinidad and Tobago) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Nathaniel James following a fast break.
Substitution, Trinidad and Tobago. Joevin Jones replaces Kevin Molino.
Substitution, Trinidad and Tobago. Wayne Frederick II replaces Dante Sealy.

Goal! Trinidad and Tobago 6, St. Kitts And Nevis 2. Nathaniel James (Trinidad and Tobago) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Tyrese Spicer with a cross.
